This directory is a placeholder for same-origin model mirror testing.

Place the real files from:
https://huggingface.co/onnx-community/Ternary-Bonsai-4B-ONNX/tree/main

under this path while preserving the Hugging Face resolve/main layout.

Example:
models/onnx-community/Ternary-Bonsai-4B-ONNX/resolve/main/config.json
models/onnx-community/Ternary-Bonsai-4B-ONNX/resolve/main/tokenizer.json
models/onnx-community/Ternary-Bonsai-4B-ONNX/resolve/main/onnx/...
